Deprecated function

Source: R/pspaceDecay.R
signalDecay.Rd

Use weibullDecay, expDecay, and linearDecay.

Usage

signalDecay(...)

Arguments

...

Deprecated arguments

Value

Stop unconditionally

Author

Sysbiolab Team

Examples

decay.fun <- weibullDecay()
